title: As Suwayq Heat Wave
lead: As Suwayq is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.26. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in As Suwayq is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 13.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 35%, and the wind speed is approximately 2.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to the prolonged heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
